heading: Termination of authority
label: 1969 Termination of authority
text: The authority of the Foundation under this subchapter shall terminate on the date that is 10 years after the establishment of the Foundation, unless the Foundation is reauthorized by an Act of Congress.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 4219 of this titlePub. L. 119–65
